_comment: Knowledge-audit allowlist (ROADMAP P1). Names that legitimately never appear in the symbol index because they are not AOT metadata elements: X++ kernel (system) classes/enums shipped with the runtime rather than PackagesLocalDirectory, and .NET types reached through CLR interop. Every entry must state WHY. Fully-qualified System.* / Microsoft.* names are accepted without an entry. Do NOT add an entry to silence a defect — a hallucinated type is not a kernel type.
DateTimeUtil: X++ kernel class (system runtime, no AOT metadata element).
Query: X++ kernel class — runtime query object model.
QueryRun: X++ kernel class — runtime query object model.
QueryBuildDataSource: X++ kernel class — runtime query object model.
QueryBuildRange: X++ kernel class — runtime query object model.
JoinMode: X++ kernel enum used by QueryBuildDataSource.joinMode().
Connection: X++ kernel class — direct SQL (Connection/Statement/ResultSet trio).
CLRInterop: X++ kernel class — CLR interop helpers.
Exception: X++ kernel enum (Exception::Error / Info / Warning) — throw argument and infolog severity.
IO_Status: X++ kernel enum — file IO status.
RecordInsertList: X++ kernel class — buffered set-based insert.
RecordViewCache: X++ kernel class — in-memory pre-load of a record set (no AOT metadata element).
UnitOfWork: X++ kernel class — coordinated insert/update/delete commit in relation order.
SysGlobalObjectCache: X++ kernel class — explicit cross-session server object cache (runtime, no AOT element).
xSession: X++ kernel class — runtime session info (xSession::currentRetryCount() etc.).
ListEnumerator: X++ kernel class — enumerator over List.
MapEnumerator: X++ kernel class — enumerator over Map.
SetEnumerator: X++ kernel class — enumerator over Set.
SecurityRights: X++ kernel class — runtime permission checks.
AccessType: X++ kernel enum — access level for SecurityRights checks.
ValidateEventArgs: X++ kernel event-args class for validate* event handlers.
ExportAttribute: System.ComponentModel.Composition.ExportAttribute (MEF) — reached via `using`, not an AOT element.
